testcases.description: Verify author can open an existing activity to duplicate a step within the same activity
testcases.expected: Open an activity with at least 1 existing stepActivity opens with all steps visible in step list
testcases.raw: TC_10 Internal CummalationPositive Verify author can open an existing activity to duplicate a step within the same activity 1. Login as Author 2. Navigate to “My Activities” 3. Open an activity with at least 1 existing stepActivity opens with all steps visible in step list

testcases.description: Verify “import” button is visible in the activity editor
testcases.expected: Look for the “import” button in the toolbar“import” button is visible and enabled
testcases.raw: TC_11 Internal CummalationPositiveVerify “import” button is visible in the activity editor 1. Open an activity 2. Look for the “import” button in the toolbar“import” button is visible and enabled

testcases.description: Verify clicking “import” opens the step library1. Click “import”
testcases.expected: Observe modal or panel opensStep library opens with search options visible
testcases.raw: TC_12 Internal CummalationPositiveVerify clicking “import” opens the step library1. Click “import” 2. Observe modal or panel opensStep library opens with search options visible

testcases.description: Verify current activity appears in step library list with correct title and created date
testcases.expected: Check for current activity entry Current activity name and created date displayed correctly
testcases.raw: TC_13 Internal CummalationPositive Verify current activity appears in step library list with correct title and created date 1. Open step library 2. Check for current activity entry Current activity name and created date displayed correctly

testcases.description: Verify search returns current activity when searching by title
testcases.expected: Click searchSearch results show current activity
testcases.raw: TC_14 Internal CummalationPositive Verify search returns current activity when searching by title 1. In step library search, enter full activity title 2. Click searchSearch results show current activity

testcases.description: Verify search returns current activity when searching by partial title1.
testcases.expected: SearchPartial match returns current activity in list
testcases.raw: TC_15 Internal CummalationPositive Verify search returns current activity when searching by partial title1. Enter partial title 2. SearchPartial match returns current activity in list

testcases.description: Verify author can see all existing steps within the current activity
testcases.expected: View step list All steps from current activity displayed in correct order
testcases.raw: TC_16 Internal CummalationPositive Verify author can see all existing steps within the current activity 1. Click on current activity entry in library 2. View step list All steps from current activity displayed in correct order

testcases.description: Verify author can select a step to duplicate1.
testcases.expected: Click “Import” Selected step is copied into current activity as a new step (n+1)
testcases.raw: TC_17 Internal CummalationPositiveVerify author can select a step to duplicate1. Select a step from list 2. Click “Import” Selected step is copied into current activity as a new step (n+1)

testcases.description: Verify duplicated step retains all content from original step
testcases.expected: Compare original and duplicated step content Content matches exactly, including text, images, formatting, widgets
testcases.raw: TC_18 Internal CummalationPositive Verify duplicated step retains all content from original step 1. Duplicate a step 2. Compare original and duplicated step content Content matches exactly, including text, images, formatting, widgets

testcases.description: Verify duplicated step retains formatting (font, bullets, numbering, line breaks, styles)1. Compare formatting properties of both steps Font-family Roboto, size 16px, weight 500, line- height 136%, bullet and numbering p
testcases.expected: Compare formatting properties of both steps Font-family Roboto, size 16px, weight 500, line- height 136%, bullet and numbering preserved
testcases.raw: TC_19 Internal CummalationPositive Verify duplicated step retains formatting (font, bullets, numbering, line breaks, styles)1. Compare formatting properties of both steps Font-family Roboto, size 16px, weight 500, line- height 136%, bullet and numbering preserved

testcases.description: Verify user can edit duplicated step content
testcases.expected: SaveChanges are saved and only affect duplicated step
testcases.raw: TC_20 Internal CummalationPositiveVerify user can edit duplicated step content 1. Open duplicated step 2. Edit text and formatting 3. SaveChanges are saved and only affect duplicated step

testcases.expected: SaveMetadata changes apply to duplicated step only

testcases.expected: Click “Preview” Step is saved and appears correctly in preview mode

testcases.expected: View duplicated step All text, formatting, and media displayed accurately

testcases.expected: Check step sequence Duplicated step appears immediately after original or at end, as per design

testcases.expected: Click “Cancel”No new step created

testcases.expected: Try to duplicate step“Permission denied” message shown

testcases.expected: SaveDuplication completes without performance issue

testcases.description: Verify child step data is cumulated to parent step before submit (Core LOS)
testcases.expected: Navigate to parent step before submitting Parent step displays updated cumulative data reflecting child step input

Complete child step 3. Navigate to parent step before submitting Parent step displays updated cumulative data reflecting child step input

testcases.description: Verify network failure before submit does not update parent
testcases.expected: Navigate to parentNo update on parent until connection restored

testcases.description: Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “In Progress” student (before submit)
testcases.expected: Teacher opens the activity report Teacher sees updated cumulative data in the report for the “In Progress” student
testcases.raw: TC_55 Internal CummalationPositive Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “In Progress” student (before submit) 1. Student starts activity (Core LOS) 2. Completes child step but has not submitted parent step 3. Teacher opens the activity report Teacher sees updated cumulative data in the report for the “In Progress” student

testcases.description: Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “In Progress” student (after submit)
testcases.expected: Teacher views report Teacher sees updated data from submitted child step reflected in parent
testcases.raw: TC_56 Internal CummalationPositive Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “In Progress” student (after submit) 1. Student starts activity and submits child step 2. Student still in progress overall 3. Teacher views report Teacher sees updated data from submitted child step reflected in parent

testcases.description: Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “Completed” student
testcases.expected: Teacher views report Teacher sees full cumulative data from all child steps in parent step
testcases.raw: TC_57 Internal CummalationPositive Verify teacher sees cumulative data for “Completed” student 1. Student completes activity 2. Teacher views report Teacher sees full cumulative data from all child steps in parent step

testcases.raw: TC_59 Internal CummalationPositive Verify teacher view updates when student moves from “In Progress” → “Completed” 1. Student in “In Progress” state 2. Completes remaining steps 3. Teacher refreshes reportTeacher view updates to full cumulative data
